meta.title: Sandboxx Letter Example
meta.description:
Have you ever wondered what it looks like when your recruit in basic training receives a Sandboxx Letter? Co-Founder & CEO, Sam Meek, shows you exactly what Sandboxx Letters looks like.

Learn more about How Sandboxx Works:
https://link.sandboxx.us/how-does-sandboxx-work

Download Sandboxx:
https://link.sandboxx.us/k4sKgsv4oS
